description: An onboarding or tax form completed by a newly hired employee, establishing their employment status, starting details, and withholding selections.

employee_name.instruction: The full name of the newly hired employee.

employer_name.instruction: The official name of the hiring company or organization.

hire_date.instruction: The employee's official first day of work or effective hire date.

job_title.instruction: The position, role, or job title assigned to the new hire.

filing_status.instruction: The tax withholding filing status chosen by the employee, such as Single, Married filing jointly, or Head of household.
